summary: Frontend-only test of new additions: Client view tabs (Goals & Scenarios, Sandbox merged into Retirement) and Adviser Portfolio Rebalancing integration. 5/6 features pass; 1 critical bug in Client360View Rebalance tab (TabsContent block missing).

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking [data-testid=tab-rebalance] renders an EMPTY tab body. PortfolioRebalancing is imported (line 20) and the tab is registered in TAB_DEFS (line 35), BUT no <TabsContent value=\"rebalance\"> block exists in the JSX (between lines 99-105). The TabsTrigger is generated dynamically so the tab is clickable, but no panel content is mounted. Active role=tabpanel returns null on click.

integration_issues.issue: Review request says SimpleClientView (with new Goals tab + embedded sandbox) should render at /client-portal, but /client-portal is wired to UnifiedDashboard (PersonalDashboard) via AppRouter.jsx line 209. SimpleClientView is actually served at /dashboard via DashboardRouter when no selected_client is set. All NEW SimpleClientView features verified working at /dashboard — but if the requirement is that the client-facing URL is /client-portal, the route mapping is wrong.

client_view_simpleclientview_at_/dashboa.goals_tab_renders_simplegoals: PASS — '3 goals in play' with progress bars rendered, no error boundary

adviser_unifiedclientoverview.verified_route: /dashboard with app_mode=adviser & selected_client (DashboardRouter -> UnifiedClientOverview); /unified-client-overview is NOT a registered route

adviser_client360view_/client-360.issue: TabsContent block missing — empty panel rendered. Active tabpanel = null after click.

action_items: FIX (Client360View.jsx ~line 101): add `<TabsContent value=\"rebalance\" className=\"space-y-6\" data-testid=\"tab-content-rebalance\"><PortfolioRebalancing embedded /></TabsContent>` between the Investments and Tax TabsContent blocks. Currently the Rebalance tab renders an empty panel because the TabsContent block was forgotten (only the import + TAB_DEFS entry were added).

CLARIFY routing: review request expects SimpleClientView at /client-portal, but AppRouter.jsx routes /client-portal -> UnifiedDashboard (PersonalDashboard). SimpleClientView is reachable only at /dashboard. Either change the route, or update the requirement to /dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: Client360View.jsx imports PortfolioRebalancing but never uses it in JSX — dead import + missing TabsContent. ESLint should have flagged unused import, suggesting lint rules are lax for this file.

DashboardRouter logic (AppRouter.jsx L68-74) is the actual entry point for SimpleClientView; the /client-portal route bypasses this router entirely. This split routing is fragile and confusing — consider consolidating or documenting clearly.

success_rate.frontend: 83% (5/6 features working; 1 broken tab + 1 routing mismatch)

test_credentials: No auth required. localStorage: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='client'|'adviser', selected_client=JSON for adviser flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After E1 adds the missing <TabsContent value='rebalance'> in Client360View.jsx, re-test /client-360?clientId=client_1 and click [data-testid=tab-rebalance] to confirm PortfolioRebalancing renders (look for 'Total Drift', 'Drift Analysis' text). All other new features (SimpleClientView at /dashboard, UnifiedClientOverview Rebalancing tab, sidebar link, /portfolio-rebalancing page) confirmed working. Note: SimpleClientView is served at /dashboard not /client-portal — confirm with E1 if route mapping change is desired.
rca of the issue: Client360View Rebalance bug RCA: Developer added (1) `import PortfolioRebalancing from '@/pages/PortfolioRebalancing'` (line 20), and (2) `{ value: 'rebalance', label: 'Rebalance' }` in TAB_DEFS (line 35). The TabsTrigger is generated by the TAB_DEFS map loop so the tab button appears. However, the developer FORGOT to add a corresponding `<TabsContent value='rebalance'>...</TabsContent>` block alongside the other 14 TabsContent blocks (lines 85-250). Without a matching TabsContent, Radix Tabs renders nothing for the active panel. Reproduction: navigate /client-360?clientId=client_1, click the 'Rebalance' tab — the page area below tabs is blank. Mitigation: insert the missing TabsContent block.
